# Phase 8 contributor evidence

The Contribute section consolidates durable source material from the repository map, architecture, platform contracts, migrations, tests, CI, release workflow, documentation content model, IA, style guide, and accessible visualization guidance.

## Internal/public boundary

The public section does not expose agent prompts, project PRDs, issue-specific implementation plans, QA fixtures, screenshot manifests, browser receipts, or temporary design explorations. Those remain under repository or project-internal locations.
